creator: sekayib685@haislot.com
text:
(In reply to Neal Nelson from comment #1)
Got it, thanks for the detailed explanation. It seems like addressing the Linux-specific assumptions in the nimlsp project and creating a port for FreeBSD compatibility will be necessary before we can proceed with building nimlsp on FreeBSD. I'll look into these steps further.
https://www.digital-trebuchet.com
